title: iberis linifolia subsp. hegelmaieri
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. hegelmaieri, also known as rock-cress, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting immune function. Rock-cress has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
